steps.assistant_text: 32-insn 2-stage dispatcher. Stage 1: gl_func(a0->0x528); set D[0x40]/D[0x44] based on v0. Stage 2 (always runs): test a0->[0x4F8] — if 0, store 0 to a0->[0x504]; else call gl_func(a0, -1, 0). Initial decode mistakenly nested the t9 check inside the v0==0 branch; correct structure has the t9 check ALWAYS run after the v0 dispatch (target's  from the v0!=0 path converges into the t9 check).

metadata.verification: Verified byte-correct via objcopy compare of build/.o vs expected/.o.
